items.title: Thomas Partey LIED on Canada entry form for World Cup as ex-Arsenal star claimed he had never been charged with a crime
items.summary: THOMAS Partey lied on his application for a temporary visa to visit Canada ahead of Ghana’s World Cup opener, a court has found. items.title: Brilliant Mbappe becomes France's top scorer in win over Senegal
items.summary: Kylian Mbappe became the highest scorer in France's history as his sensational double powered Les Bleus to a 3-1 win over Senegal in their Group I World Cup opener in New Jersey.

items.title: Partey loses Canadian visa appeal
items.summary: An appeal against the decision to deny Ghana’s Thomas Partey a Canadian visa for the World Cup has failed – with court documents revealing the initial visa application did not disclose the criminal charges he faces in the UK.
